name: laibench
description: CLI-first reference benchmark and leaderboard harness for radiology finding-to-report generation.

scripts.smoke:mock: tsx src/cli.ts suite --suite suites/lite-public.pt-BR.json --provider command --cmd "node examples/mock-agent.mjs" --run-name mock-agent --out runs/mock-agent.json
scripts.smoke:leaderboard: tsx src/cli.ts leaderboard --inputs runs/mock-agent.json --out runs/leaderboard.json --markdown runs/leaderboard.md
scripts.smoke:en: tsx src/cli.ts suite --suite suites/lite-public.en-US.json --provider command --cmd "node examples/mock-agent.mjs" --run-name mock-en --out runs/mock-en.json
scripts.smoke:reliability: tsx src/cli.ts suite --suite suites/lite-public.pt-BR.json --provider command --cmd "node examples/mock-agent.mjs" --run-name mock-agent-2 --out runs/mock-agent-2.json && tsx src/cli.ts reliability --inputs runs/mock-agent.json runs/mock-agent-2.json --out runs/reliability.json --markdown runs/reliability.md
